title: Tangy Irish Hash
description: A flavorful, vegan breakfast dish that combines tender Irish potatoes with tangy flavors.
instructions: Peel and dice the Irish potatoes into small cubes.
In a bowl, mix together the diced potatoes, hash, and tangy relish.
Dip each potato piece into the semolina, coating evenly.
Place the coated potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with additional tangy relish if desired.
